CERT MAIL TO SALVATORE CIOLINO, OWNER STONE AND TILE SOLUTIONS RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OEI, T.LEE OEI, CECILIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STONE & TILE SOLUTIONS (CIOLINO, SALVATORE -OWNER) $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $726.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT STONE & TILE SOLUTIONS (CIOLINO, SALVATORE -OWNER)
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-05-2000, GRANTED
